title: Fix queue streaming operator compilation error

features.name: queue assignment from streaming packed array
features.description: Code should include a queue assigned from a streaming operator applied to a packed array with size greater than 64 bits

features.name: packed array assignment from streaming queue
features.description: Code should include a packed array assigned from a streaming operator applied to a queue

features.name: queue to queue streaming
features.description: Code should include a queue assigned from streaming operator applied to another queue with alternating slice sizes
